title: Lakebridge Agentic Converter is in Beta
body:
The Lakebridge Agentic Converter is in [Beta](/aws/en/release-notes/release-types). Use it to convert legacy SQL dialects, such as T-SQL, Snowflake, Redshift, Oracle, BigQuery, and Teradata, to ANSI SQL in migration projects in your workspace. Powered by Genie Code, the converter analyzes each source script, validates syntax and semantic intent, and iteratively fixes errors before writing the results to your workspace. A workspace admin must enable it from the **Previews** page.

See [Convert SQL with the Lakebridge Agentic Converter](/aws/en/migration/lakebridge-agentic-converter).

ref_links.text: Convert SQL with the Lakebridge Agentic Converter
